brands.name: Asian Paints

profiles.title: Asian Paints | LinkedIn
profiles.description:
Asian Paints | 720,469 followers on LinkedIn. They say home is where the heart is. Which is why, since 1942, we’ve been helping customers transform empty properties to homes by dressing them up in warm hues, pastel shades and cool colours, to create spaces that truly represent you.
Asian Paints has a lot of identities.

brands.name: Berger Paints

profiles.title: Berger Paints India | LinkedIn
profiles.description: Berger Paints India | 461,237 followers on LinkedIn. Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Berger Paints India Limited. ‘A Legacy of Trust and Innovating for Future’ – the driving forces of Berger Paints – reflect the very spirit of its founder Lewis Berger – who laid the foundations of brand Berger way back in 1760 in the UK. With modest beginnings in India in 1923, we are celebrating a century of inspiring beautiful spaces.
